svg.text: 6 Sensor Types → Integrity Verification → Detection Layers → LSTM-AE Baseline → Agentic LLM Swarm → 4-Track MLOps Pipeline
Wire → AF_PACKET → Arkime Capture → Redpanda (Kafka) → Rust ML Gateway [simd_json · noise filter · 42-field extraction · is_internal_dst · port_class]
→ SQLite WAL spool (max 50GB cap) → sorted Parquet (ZSTD, 50K row groups) → HTTPS POST + partition hints (X-Partition-Date/Hour)
all 6 sensor types stamp at point of origin
① HMAC ② Temporal/Seq ③ Cross-OS
PHASE 3 -- DETECTION LAYERS (RUST WORKERS) + MODEL A BASELINE
Concurrency gate for lateral movement storms
Model A baseline uses network_tap 8D for LSTM-AE reconstruction
Event-Driven · 5 Expert Agents · Multi-Model · DuckDB Pivot
HitL circuit breaker · fleet-aware blast radius
Flash Attention 2 · PagedAttention KV · Podman Quadlets
Models B + C + D served via vLLM (GPU) · Model A runs independently (CPU)
PHASE 6 -- SOVEREIGN MLOPS PIPELINE (4-TRACK + MODEL A)
Closed-Loop · Self-Terminating · Priority Oversampling · safetensors only
telemetry/cloud_flow/dt=*/hour=*/*.parquet · telemetry/network_tap/dt=*/hour=*/*.parquet · Qdrant scroll API · SOAR decision logs
Source: Qdrant named vectors + payload context
SpatialProjector MLP per vector space head
C2 flow + score labels → TTP reasoning
Source: SOAR decision log + golden labels
MODEL A PIPELINE (CPU · INDEPENDENT OF vLLM)
DuckDB → sliding windows (64x8) per IP pair
Threshold calibration: μ+3σ on eval set
All 4 evals pass → merge · Any fail → halt + retrain failing track
04_merge → SHA-384 sign → 05_serve (atomic symlink) → vLLM hot-reload | Model A: systemd restart
ZERO STATE -- ATTACK SURFACE RETURNED TO ZERO
Only forensic artifacts persist. All containers, databases, contexts, and secrets destroyed.
PHASE 1 (6 Sensors) → PHASE 2 (Ingress/Fan-Out) → PHASE 3 (Detection + Model A Baseline) → PHASE 4 (5-Agent LLM Swarm) → PHASE 5 (Operator/Containment) → PHASE 6 (4-Track MLOps) → ZERO STATE
